projects.name: On Deck!
projects.description: Developed a scalable e-commerce platform with advanced search functionality, seamless payment integration, and personalized recommendations, resulting in a 30% increase in conversion rates.
Designed and implemented a real-time data analytics dashboard using Python and Elasticsearch, empowering business stakeholders to make data-driven decisions and reducing reporting time by 50%.

Led a cross-functional team in building a mobile app for a healthcare startup, utilizing React Native and Firebase, which enhanced patient engagement and achieved a 20% reduction in appointment cancellations.

Collaborated with a team of engineers to architect and implement a microservices-based architecture using Docker and Kubernetes, resulting in improved scalability, fault tolerance, and reduced deployment time by 75%.
